title: The King Punch Changes the Ring
description: Pages 1–4 focus on the king punch changes the ring, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Cavendish, Don Chinjao, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #2 as powerful fighters clash in the Colosseum and the scale of the tournament becomes clearer through Elizabello, Chinjao, and the other competitors.

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: In the past, GARP was regarded as a demon by Pirates ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even with the passing of many decades, my scars have not faded....!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: As the grandson of the Begrudged, you will give me my satisfaction...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take it out on Gramps, not me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So you really are his grandson then!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah! No, that's wrong! I'm Lucy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll cut you down right here !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If I had become aware of the existence of his son, dragon, sooner...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You never would have been born into this world!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Don chinjao is on a rampage !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is no joke!! I don't know how much he's weakened since then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But he had a bounty over 500 million in his prime!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't get in my way!! This is my prey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's...!! It's "Duran- Dal," one of the world's greatest blades!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Whoa!! It pierced right through his head...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A head that can't be stabbed ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...and the power to stop such a giant in his tracks! These guys aren't human!!

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on the king punch changes the ring, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
